title: North America Clean Fuels Market Monthly Review: October 2025
content:
Key Highlights:

BC LCFS monthly trading volumes fell from 266.87 K credits in August to 11.97K credits in September. In September, BC LCFS credit prices increased by 3.42% MoM. In September, OR CFP average credit prices increased by 30.81% compared to August. OR CFP trading activity witnessed a 2.6% rise in September CA LCFS average monthly credit price for Type 1 trades fell by 0.33% month-over-month (MoM) in October. Monthly credit transactions increased by 258.92% MoM in October. Canada CFR bid and offer prices for CC2 & CC3 rose MoM in October. Both average CC3 and CC2 offer price rose by 9.42% . CC2 and CC3 average bid prices stand at 361.65 CAD & average offer prices stand at 372.15 CAD in October. Average credit prices in WA CFS fell by 10.22% MoM in September. In September, 79.46K credits were traded with a total transaction value of $2.19 M. RIN generation increased by 0.96% MoM in September. 6.15B RINs were transacted in the month of September, recording nearly a 10.57% MoM rise.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
